## Summary

Describe the change and why it belongs in Retold.

## Player or developer impact

Explain what players, pack authors, or maintainers will notice.

## Validation

- [ ] `./gradlew build`
- [ ] `./gradlew runGameTestServer`, when relevant
- [ ] Focused in-game testing, when relevant

## Documentation and release notes

- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` for player-facing or notable technical changes
- [ ] Updated README or internal system documentation when behavior or architecture changed
- [ ] Added or updated tests where practical

## Visual evidence

Add screenshots or video for visual, world-generation, UI, model, or texture changes.

## Licensing

- [ ] I have the right to contribute every included file.
- [ ] Code and non-asset contributions are provided under `LICENSE-CODE.md`.
- [ ] I discussed creative asset contributions with the maintainer before including them.
